commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a guarded reader for cached context report tool entries, uses it in `/context` text diagnostics and treemap rendering, and adds regressions for unreadable tool names.

PR surface: Source +61, Tests +59. Total +120 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main directly reads cached tool report names and size fields, and the PR body records a red focused test with a throwing tool-name getter before the fix.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; this draft maintainer PR should continue through normal maintainer validation and merge readiness checks.

target.title: fix(auto-reply): guard context report tool entries
target.body:
## Summary
- Guard cached context report tool entries before `/context detail` and `/context map` read tool names and size fields.
- Reuse one normalized tool-report view for text diagnostics and the treemap renderer.
- Add focused regressions for unreadable tool report names in detail output and PNG context maps.

## Verification
- Red repro before fix: `CI=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=30000 OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_HEARTBEAT_MS=10000 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/auto-reply/reply/commands-context-report.test.ts -t "omits unreadable tool report entries" --reporter=verbose --pool=forks --maxWorkers=1 --fileParallelism=false --teardownTimeout=1000` failed with `fuzzed unreadable report tool name` at `src/auto-reply/reply/commands-context-report.ts:181`.
- `CI=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=30000 OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_HEARTBEAT_MS=10000 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/auto-reply/reply/commands-context-report.test.ts -t "omits unreadable tool report entries" --reporter=verbose --pool=forks --maxWorkers=1 --fileParallelism=false --teardownTimeout=1000`
- `CI=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=30000 OPENCLAW_VITEST_NO_OUTPUT_HEARTBEAT_MS=10000 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/auto-reply/reply/commands-context-report.test.ts --reporter=verbose --pool=forks --maxWorkers=1 --fileParallelism=false --teardownTimeout=1000`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --write --threads=1 src/auto-reply/reply/context-report-tools.ts src/auto-reply/reply/context-treemap.ts src/auto-reply/reply/commands-context-report.ts src/auto-reply/reply/commands-context-report.test.ts`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/auto-reply/reply/context-report-tools.ts src/auto-reply/reply/context-treemap.ts src/auto-reply/reply/commands-context-report.ts src/auto-reply/reply/commands-context-report.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` clean before rebase: no accepted/actionable findings, `overall: patch is correct (0.84)`.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` clean after rebase: no accepted/actionable findings, `overall: patch is correct (0.82)`.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: A malformed cached context report tool entry with an unreadable `name` getter no longer crashes `/context detail` or `/context map` before the user receives diagnostics.
Real environment tested: Local linked OpenClaw worktree on branch `fuzz-tool-schema-next76-20260603`, rebased onto `origin/main` `b6cee3fc35a144430d3a8b74c1ca4f0dab49cee2`, using the repo Vitest wrapper for the focused auto-reply context report test file.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/auto-reply/reply/commands-context-report.test.ts --reporter=verbose --pool=forks --maxWorkers=1 --fileParallelism=false --teardownTimeout=1000`, plus focused formatter/lint/diff/autoreview checks listed above.
Evidence after fix: The full focused test file passed with 1 file / 12 tests on the rebased head; direct scoped `oxfmt`, direct scoped `oxlint`, `git diff --check`, and branch autoreview passed.
Observed result after fix: `/context detail` still reports the healthy `read` tool and size breakdown while omitting the unreadable entry; `/context map` still returns a sensitive local PNG treemap instead of throwing.
What was not tested: Full `pnpm check:changed` was not run locally. This linked worktree had only a few hundred MiB free disk, and Blacksmith Testbox is unauthenticated locally (`blacksmith testbox list --all` reports `not authenticated`).
target.author: vincentkoc
